title: Rich Buttery Spanish Runner Beans Stew
description: A rich and creamy Spanish stew made with runner beans and coconut cream, cooked to perfection in a cataplana vessel. This dish is a show-off Galician recipe that is onion and garlic free.

ingredients.name: runner beans
ingredients.notes: trimmed and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the runner beans to the vessel and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the vessel and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the runner beans are tender, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the coconut cream and cook until the stew is heated through.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter to the vessel and stir until melted.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the stew and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
